name: marathon-config
prompt: Ops reports that in production, environment-variable settings (like APP_ENDPOINT) are being ignored whenever a config file is also present — the docstring contract says env always wins. The service lives at {DIR}, tests in src/test_config.py (they pass). Find the root cause and fix it. Work only inside that directory. When finished, your final message is your report.

grade.check_cmd: cd {DIR}/src && APP_ENDPOINT=https://env-wins python3 -c "import json,tempfile,sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from core.config import load_settings; f=tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile('w',suffix='.json',delete=False); json.dump({'endpoint':'https://from-file'},f); f.close(); s=load_settings(f.name); assert s['endpoint']=='https://env-wins', s['endpoint']; print('ok')" && python3 test_config.py
